title: perama hirsuta
intro: Perama hirsuta, also known as hairy perama, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to soothe and calm various health issues. The health benefits of Perama hirsuta include reducing fever, relieving pain and discomfort, and treating respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Perama hirsuta can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
